text:
Tried reading XHCI_HCSPARAMS0 , XHCI_HCSPARAMS1 and XHCI_HCSPARAMS2 then applied same logic like below but looks like I a doing wrong 
Need to know what is exact register for reading major and minor 

#define	XHCI_EXT_PORT_MAJOR(x)	(((x) >> 24) & 0xff)
#define	XHCI_EXT_PORT_MINOR(x)	(((x) >> 16) & 0xff
